About fliptopbattles:
FlipTop Kru Corp. is a self-produced events and artist management company with its first product in the FlipTop Battle League. The FlipTop Battle League is the Philippines‚Äô first premier ‚Äì and the world‚Äôs most-viewed ‚Äì rap battle league. It is popularly credited for the resurgence and widespread acceptance of hiphop culture in the Philippines since its inception in February 2010, and continues to champion all other hiphop elements in its variety of events and online content. It is home to the country‚Äôs top Hiphop talents and houses divisions in the main island groups of Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for ‚ÄúYou All Over Me‚Äù (Feat. Maren Morris) (Taylor‚Äôs Version) [From The Vault] ‚Äì off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor‚Äôs Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
‚ñ∫Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

‚ñ∫Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
‚ñ∫Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
‚ñ∫Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‚Äòem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‚Äòdon't you wish you had me‚Äô grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
I‚Äôve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing You All Over Me (Taylor‚Äôs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). ¬© 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/YkrN0X

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ‚ñ∫ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Stranded Ever Given back afloat in Suez Canal: Reports
snippet.description:
The Ever Given has been ‚Äúsuccessfully refloated‚Äù on the Suez Canal, according to Inchcape Shipping Services, a week after it ran aground in high winds blocking one of the world‚Äôs busiest shipping lanes.
‚ÄúShe is being secured at the moment. More information about next steps will follow once they are known,‚Äù the company said on Twitter.

snippet.title: COVID IN OUR HOME | GARY VALENCIANO
snippet.description:
Hey everyone. Here‚Äôs a little update about the news that came out regarding my wife. 
She is positive and I am negative. 
Thank you for all your prayers. 
I will skip any bike vlogs for this week as I think this is more important. 
Let‚Äôs keep praying for our countrymen...especially those who have the virus but have no one with them and very little finances to sustain themselves through this. God bless us all.

snippet.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
snippet.description:
‚ÄúSana‚Äôy di nalang kita nakilala, sana‚Äôy di nalang kita nakasama..‚Äù üåñ‚ú®üåä

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesn‚Äôt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng ‚ÄúSana‚Äôy di nalang‚Äù ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

www.PedreelsMusicStudio.com

www.facebook.com/PedreelsMusicStudioOfficial/

fil.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
fil.description:
‚ÄúSana‚Äôy di nalang kita nakilala, sana‚Äôy di nalang kita nakasama..‚Äù üåñ‚ú®üåä

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesn‚Äôt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng ‚ÄúSana‚Äôy di nalang‚Äù ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

snippet.title: Binibining Pilipinas inuudyukan na HUWAG NANG MAGPADALA ng Kandidata sa Miss Grand International
snippet.description: Malinaw ang sigaw ng sambayanang Pilipino sa Binibining Pilipinas Charities Incorporated at kay Madam Stella Araneta na itigil na ang pagpapadala ng ating mga kandidata sa Miss Grand International. Dahil sa ilang beses na umano tayong nananakawan ng korona sa nasabing Beauty Pageant ng Thailand, kagaya ni Samantha Bernardo at Nicole Cordovez, mas mabuti daw na wag nalang tayong magsayang ng panibagong binibini. May nagsasabi na kahit kailan daw ay hindi maaapreciate ng MGI Organization ang galing at talino ng mga kandidatang ipinanlalaban ng Pilipinas dahil bitter daw ang mga ito sa tagumpay ng ating bansa sa larangan ng Beauty Pageant. Pilipinas kase ang katangi-tanging bansa sa Southeast Asia na itinuturing na Power House. Pinas din ang pangalawa sa pinakamaraming  koronang naipanalo sa Big 4 Beauty Pageant.

snippet.title: TATAWA KAYO, MAIINIS AT TIYAK NA MAIIYAK!
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=45xq0CN4O68&t=25s

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 16 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Stranded cargo ship in Suez Canal could 'take weeks' to free | DW News
snippet.description:
Japanese media are reporting that the owner of a huge container ship blocking Egypt's Suez canal aims to free it by Saturday. But experts are warning it could take weeks. More than a hundred and fifty ships are waiting to get in to what is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with hundreds more headed its way. A prolonged suspension of traffic in the Suez will almost certainly impact global trade, which has already been hit hard by the pandemic. The Suez Canal is a choke-point for world-trade. It connects Asia and Europe and sees 30-percent of the global container-shipping-volume every day.
Dredging teams worked through the night to try to clear the canal bed around the 200,000 ton ship. The stranded Ever Given is holding up around 10 billion dollars in trade every day it is stuck.
Diggers, tugboats, dredgers and a crack team of Dutchmen known as the special forces of salvage operations have been drafted in to help. It's thought containers may have to be offloaded to lighten the vessel - though one mistake could spell disaster.
According to maritime historian Sal Mercogliano, "The bow is basically in Asia, the stern's in Africa, and the middle is in the middle of the canal. And what you can't do is take a lot of weight off the ends and put a lot of what they call a 'sagging stress' on the vessel. You could conceivably crack the hull, cause an oil spill. But worse, catastrophically fracture the vessel in half, which would close the canal for months, if not years, to salvage a vessel of that type."
150 ships are caught in the traffic jam. Each passing day piles on the pressure for global trade routes, already struggling with the coronavirus pandemic.
Those involved have warned it could be weeks before the vessel is freed. Bad news for those stuck in the world's longest maritime tailback.

snippet.title: Woman records on her phone as strange man stalks her through downtown Vancouver
snippet.description:
A Vancouver woman is speaking out about a frightening experience after she was followed closely by a strange man for more than half an hour.

Jamie Coutts filmed much of the encounter and said her stalker didn‚Äôt appear phased by the camera at all.

Coutts said in retrospect she should have phoned police, but that in the stress of the moment her priority was getting somewhere safe and staying ahead of her pursuer.

Coutts has since reported the incident to Vancouver police, who say they are investigating.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7705868/frightening-video-man-follows-vancouver-woman/ 

Subscribe to Global News Channel HERE: http://bit.ly/20fcXDc
Like Global News on Facebook HERE: http://bit.ly/255GMJQ
Follow Global News on Twitter HERE: http://bit.ly/1Toz8mt
Follow Global News on Instagram HERE: https://bit.ly/2QZaZIB
#GlobalNews

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äã #FutureNostalgia‚Äã #Grammys

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

localized.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
localized.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

snippet.title: NBA Trade Deadline 2021 LIVE
snippet.description:
NBA Trade Deadline 2021 is here as the deadline passes at 3p ET, Thursday, March 25th. NBA Trade Rumors & News are BUZZING following the Nikola Vucevic trade to the Chicago Bulls for Wendell Carter Jr., Otto Porter and 2 first round picks. Big-name players like Kyle Lowry, Lonzo Ball, Lauri Markkanen, Aaron Gordon and several other players could be on the move as they continue to be connected to NBA trade rumors. Chat Sports hosts Harrison Graham & Chase Senior are LIVE breaking down the latest NBA news & rumors on today‚Äôs 2021 NBA Trade Deadline Special.

SUBSCRIBE to Chat Sports as we‚Äôll have all of NBA Trade Deadline 2021 coverage: https://www.youtube.com/chatsportstv?sub_confirmation=1

Kyle Lowry trade rumors are heating up as he‚Äôs the top player on the NBA trade block. Shams Charania and Adrian Wojnarowski report that the Lakers, 76ers and Heat are all interested in trading for Lowry. The Orlando Magic are also taking calls on Nikola Vucevic and Terrence Ross as they appear to be sellers before the NBA Trade Deadline. Javale McGee, Cory Joseph and Delon Wright have already been traded today.

NBA Youngboy thinks he has all of the latest NBA trade rumors & news, but Chat Sports is LIVE on YouTube for the 2021 NBA Trade Deadline breaking down all of the trades that happen.

Trades happening today:
- Aaron Gordon trade to Denver for Gary Harris, RJ Hampton & a 1st Round Pick
- Nikola Vucevic trade to Chicago
- Nemanja Bjelica trade to Miami for Moe Harkless
- George Hill trade to 76ers in 3-team move with the Thunder & Knicks, including Terrance Ferguson
- Rajon Rondo trade to the Clippers for Lemon Pepper Lou Williams
- JJ Redick trade to the Mavs, along with Trey Lyles in a 3-team deal with the Spurs and Pelicans
- Victor Oladipo trade to the Heat

Follow our hosts on Twitter for more NBA rumors & news:
Harrison: http://twitter.com/hgrahamnfl
Chase: http://twitter.com/chase_senior

Check out our NBA-team specific YouTube Channels:
Los Angeles Lakers Report: https://www.youtube.com/lakerstv?sub_confirmation=1 
Golden State Warriors Today: https://www.youtube.com/Warriorstv?sub_confirmation=1
Boston Celtics Today: https://www.youtube.com/CelticsTV?sub_confirmation=1
Dallas Mavericks Today: https://www.youtube.com/Mavstv?sub_confirmation=1

Interact with Chat Sports on Social Media:
https://www.twitter.com/chatsports
https://www.instagram.com/chatsports
https://www.facebook.com/chatsports

For more NBA trade rumors & buzz, head over to http://chatsports.com/nba

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency‚Äôs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

snippet.title: Why you can't compare Covid-19 vaccines
snippet.description:
What a vaccine's "efficacy rate" actually means.

Sign up for our newsletter: http://www.vox.com/video-newsletter

In the US, the first two available Covid-19 vaccines were the ones from Pfizer/BioNTech and Moderna. Both vaccines have very high "efficacy rates," of around 95%. But the third vaccine introduced in the US, from Johnson & Johnson, has a considerably lower efficacy rate: just 66%.

Look at those numbers next to each other, and it's natural to conclude that one of them is considerably worse. Why settle for 66% when you can have 95%? But that isn't the right way to understand a vaccine's efficacy rate, or even to understand what a vaccine does. And public health experts say that if you really want to know which vaccine is the best one, efficacy isn't actually the most important number at all.

Further reading from Vox:

Why comparing Covid-19 vaccine efficacy numbers can be misleading: https://www.vox.com/22311625/covid-19-vaccine-efficacy-johnson-moderna-pfizer

The vaccine metric that matters more than efficacy: https://www.vox.com/22273502/covid-vaccines-pfizer-moderna-johnson-astrazeneca-efficacy-deaths

The limits of what vaccine efficacy numbers can tell us: https://www.vox.com/21575420/oxford-moderna-pfizer-covid-19-vaccine-trial-biontech-astrazeneca-results

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

Or Twitter: http://goo.gl/XFrZ5H

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
More from NPR Music: 
Tiny Desk Concerts: https://www.npr.org/tinydesk‚Äã
Twitter: https://twitter.com/nprmusic‚Äã
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nprmusic

More from Justin Bieber:
"Peaches" Video: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/PeachesVid
Justice The Album Out Now: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/Justice  

The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ‚Äî stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ‚Äî just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts ‚Äî which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago ‚Äî you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday ‚Äî the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE≈åN and Daniel Caesar ‚Äî just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: DABARKADS' VLOG!: BAON Raid! (Kanya-Kanyang Baon ang mga Dabarkads!)
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE to our channel now to get exclusive videos and full episodes of Eat Bulaga! Be with your favourite Dabarkads 24/7! 

YouTube Channel:  http://bit.ly/1Z4PNPJ

FOLLOW US! 
EB on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EBdabarkads/
EB on Twitter: https://twitter.com/EatBulaga
EB on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eatbulaga1979/
EB on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@ebdabarkads

ABOUT EAT BULAGA
Eat Bulaga! (or EB) is the longest noon-time variety show in the Philippines produced by Television And Production Exponents Inc. (TAPE) and currently aired by GMA Network. The show broadcasts from the new APT Studios at the No. 80 Marcos Highway, San Isidro, Cainta, 1900, Rizal. Eat Bulaga! is aired Weekdays at 12:00pm to 2:35pm and Saturdays at 11:30am to 2:45pm (PHT).

Due to continued Community Quarantine guidelines amidst COVID-19 pandemic, live studio audience reservation is suspended.

#EatBulaga #Dabarkads

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs

snippet.title: Jayda performs "Paano Kung Naging Tayo?" LIVE on Wish 107.5 Bus
snippet.description:
Singer-songwriter Jayda performs "Paano Kung Naging Tayo?" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! The song ‚Äî which is the first Tagalong piece that she has written ‚Äî talks about what could have been only if the narrator was able to express her feelings for her special someone. 

Follow Wish 107.5's social media accounts!  
Facebook: https://facebook.com/WishFM1075/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Wish1075 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wish1075/

snippet.title: Magkaagaw: Checkmate, Veron! | Episode 152
snippet.description:
Aired (March 22, 2021): Sa pag-aakala ni Veron na makikipag-ayos na si Gilda sa kanya, tila naipit sa kumunoy ang una dahil pinagkaisahan na siya ng lahat upang ilantad ang lahat ng kanyang baho.

Catch the latest episodes of 'Magkaagaw' Mondays to Saturdays at 2:30 PM on GMA Afternoon Prime, starring Sunshine Dizon as Laura, Sheryl Cruz as Veron, Jeric Gonzales as Jio, and Klea Pineda as Clarisse. Also in the cast are Isay Alvarez, Dennis Padilla, Polo Ravales, Lovely Abella, Joana Marie Tan, Dion Ignacio, and Patricia Tumulak. #MagkaagawGMA
--------------
